stance: Trustworthy and charismatic leader respected by many but feared by some.
vita: As the captain of a notorious pirate ship, I've seen galaxies far beyond my own. My crew thrives on loyalty to me and fear for others. Our homeworld Velara is known across star systems as a hub of trade routes but also whispers of rebellion against oppressive factions.
portrait_prompt: A ruggedly handsome pirate captain with piercing blue eyes, salt-andboned skin from the harsh space climate. His face is marked by scars and sunken cheeks earned through countless skirmishes at sea; his attire a blend of traditional Velarian garb embellished with cosmic symbols reflecting our rebellious spirit against galactic oppressors.
